'''Silvuit Corporation''' was the manufacturer of the [[Svelte-class Imperial shuttle|''Svelte''-class Imperial shuttle]] and the [[Vibre-class assault cruiser|''Vibre''-class assault cruiser]].

==History==
Silvuit Corporation was a minor starship manufacturer for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and often worked as subcontractors with [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] on projects such as the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. Following the Battle of Endor, the Silvuit Corporation became one of the major suppliers for the [[Imperial Remnant]].

{{Company-stub}}
